content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (May 1, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on May 1, 2026, focused on enhancing cross-platform connectivity and security. Key achievements include the integration of a cross-platform secrets vault, improved self-hosted runtime capabilities with CORS and bearer authentication, and extensive dependency updates to maintain framework stability.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Vault and Security Integration**
*   Introduced `@elizaos/vault` for cross-platform secrets management with Settings UI integration ([#7197](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7197)).
*   Enhanced self-hosted connectivity, enabling browser dashboards over HTTPS, Capacitor mobile builds, and Electrobun desktop builds ([#7212](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7212)).

**Dependency Management and Testing**
*   Performed multiple updates to AI SDK components, including `ai`, `@ai-sdk/openai`, `@ai-sdk/provider`, and `@ai-sdk/provider-utils` ([#7214](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7214), [#7215](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7215), [#7216](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7216), [#7217](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7217), [#7223](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7223), [#7224](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7224), [#7225](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7225), [#7227](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7227), [#7229](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7229)).
*   Updated `@anthropic-ai/sdk` ([#7218](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7218)), `@electric-sql/pglite` ([#7221](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7221)), and `@biomejs/biome` ([#7228](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7228)).
*   Refactored `app-core` tests to remove API module mocks ([#7226](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7226)).
*   Updated CI/CD infrastructure, including Supabase Postgres and GitHub action artifacts ([#7219](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7219), [#7220](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7220)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   None.

## CLOSED ISSUES

**Agent Ecosystem and Integration**
*   Resolved inquiries regarding Hive Civilization x402 services ([#7211](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7211)) and the integration of SwarmScore for portable agent reputation ([#7213](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7213)).

**Build and Configuration Fixes**
*   Fixed issues with missing `claude-code-stealth.mjs` preload files by implementing a robust multi-path resolution system ([#7210](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7210)).
*   Resolved missing Drizzle `pgTable` definitions in the `plugin-sql` runtime-migrator ([#7222](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7222)).

## NEW ISSUES

**Database Schema**
*   Addressed a configuration gap where `plugin-sql` was missing specific Drizzle table definitions for entity identities and candidates ([#7222](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7222)).

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   None.
